title: DuHouse Artificial Bigger Silk Hydrangea Flower Heads with Stem Realistic Fake Hydrangea Flower Bouquets for Wedding Home Party Garden Centerpiece Pack of 6(Champgane)
features: [Size]: Hydrangea Head Diameter: 22cm; Height: 13.97cm; Stem Length: 27cm. Each hydrangea head has 90 petals and the flower head is in bloom, you can bend or cut the stems for your vase! Please note that the size of this product may vary slightly due to hand measurements. In addition, this product will be delivered compressed in a bag so you will need to manually stretch the flowers.

[Material]: Hydrangea flowers are made of high quality soft silk, metal wire as skeleton is wrapped by thick plastic. Non-toxic, color won't fade over time, perfect choice for pollen allergic people. Pack of 6pcs realistic artificial hydrangea flower heads with 6 long stems.

[Suitable for Multiple Scenes]: Lovely hydrangeas are suitable for the wedding centrepiece to create a romantic atmosphere. These blooming flowers can be combined into beautiful floral bouquets for the bride. It is also perfect for home, garden, church, office, gallery, hotel, cafe, party and other events.

[DIY]: Both artificial flowers and stems can be taken apart and combined. Feel free to bend or cut the hydrangea stems to fit your vase. Silk hydrangea flowers can also be combined with other artificial flowers to create a very special centrepiece arrangement!
[Service]: Each of our hydrangea bouquets are handmade by skilled craftsmen and comes with a 30-day unconditional return policy.
description: Product Description Hydrangea Silk Flowers Arrangement Idea Home Decor Hydrangea Ball Centerpiece Decor Hydrangea Wreath Wall Decor Reception Decor After-Sales and Maintenance Use hair dryer with hot air to dry them if squeezed. Keep them in the sun for a while. If it gets dirty, wipe it gently with a damp towel. Keep them away from fire.
